content.en:
"The fifth sect of the strongest legendary body will choose the legendary body of the night ancient lizard!"

Ye Tian took out the blood of the Dark Night Ancient Lizard's Supreme Legend, swallowed it in one gulp, and then slowly refined it.

Gradually, he obtained the cultivation method of the Dark Night Ancient Lizard's Strongest Legendary Body - the Ancient Lizard Legendary Body!

Subsequently, he urged the Legendary Blood Treasure to absorb various resources to cultivate the Ancient Lizard Legend.

After a period of time, the Ancient Lizard Legend Body was also cultivated.

"The body of the six supreme legends, my current strength has reached an unimaginable level, if I cultivate the ancient lizard legend body to the consummation realm, I am afraid that I can kill ordinary elders with one hand!" Ye Tian muttered.

However, he is currently in a very awkward position.

The first is that the blood of the Legend of the Strong is running out, and he has to keep one for his son, so he needs a lot of the blood of the Legend of the Strong.

The second is to find a way to obtain a low-quality first-order supreme rule item, but I am afraid that it will be difficult to obtain, and it is estimated that it may only be in the hands of the top ten elders of the Innate Origin Domain Alliance.

But that kind of patriarch can't look down on many things, and it's impossible to trade with him, right?

"I still have to find a way to get more Supreme Legend Blood, and as for the first sequence of Supreme Dao rule items, let's talk about it later!"

Subsequently, Ye Tian collected information about the blood of the Legend of the Xefar.

First of all, the Innate Origin Domain Alliance is impossible to trade, and the major forces are lacking, and even if they are obtained, they will be used up quickly, and it is almost impossible to trade them.

But.

After Ye Tian inquired again and again, he really knew that there might be a strong legendary-level creature in a place.

This place is the sixth legendary treasure land of the Void Domain-Legendary River Abyss.

Legend has it that there are many legendary-level creatures living in the depths of the river abyss, but no legend to the Dao realm dares to enter the legendary river abyss, just because the legend of the river abyss gave birth to an incomparably terrifying legendary-level creature before the incomparably ancient years, and the strength of the other party has reached the veteran level, and he is not an ordinary patriarch, and he has changed the rules of the legendary river abyss with his own strength.

The one who can mobilize the power of the entire Legendary River Abyss, in the Legendary River Abyss, the top elders will be killed by him.

Both the Innate Origin Alliance and the Supreme Dao Void Demon wanted to lure that legendary-level creature out, but the other party just wouldn't come out.

Therefore, neither the Innate Origin Domain Alliance nor the Legend of the Supreme Dao Void Demon dared to enter the Dao Realm.

But.

That legendary creature wouldn't bless the other legendary creatures, and if he got in and killed the other legendary creatures, he wouldn't have any problems.

"The Legend of the Dao Realm and the Extreme Dao Void Demon, once you enter, you will be sensed by the other party, but as long as I condense the copy body of a legendary-level creature before entering, there will be no problem!"

Ye Tian muttered.

"Then let's take a trip to the Legendary River Abyss!"

Ye Tian left the Winter Night Fortress, and then kept shuttling all the way.

......

this day.

Ye Tian came to the legendary river abyss.

Legend has it that Heyuan is as if it were a supreme and terrifying being, and a sword tore a hole in the void.

At this time, it was said that the river abyss exuded a terrifying aura all the time, which made Ye Tiandu a little frightened.

"It's a legendary river abyss!"

Ye Tian praised.

He wasn't going to try to get in, or he'd alarm the legendary creature, which would be bad.

That legendary-level creature is usually estimated to be sleeping or cultivating, if it doesn't alarm it, then it can sneak in, if it is alarmed and noticed by the other party, it will be a big problem.

"Let's condense the Ten Thousand Blood Golden Ape!"

Ye Tian was very fast, and he condensed the copy body of the Ten Thousand Blood Golden Ape.

Subsequently, he used the second sequence of supreme dao rules to refine this replica body, and his aura was constantly strengthening.

"Let's go in first!"

Ye Tian's 10,000-blooded golden ape copied his body and entered the legendary river abyss.

Airplanes!

A wave swept over his body, but it didn't hurt him.

"This should be the detection mechanism of the legendary river abyss, if I am detected as a legendary-level creature, it will not trigger a killing array!"

Ye Tian guessed.

Subsequently.

He shuttled through the legendary river abyss, and met many legendary creatures along the way.

This is indeed a paradise for legendary creatures, but the strength of many legendary creatures is very strong, and if he wants to kill the strongest legendary creatures, he must improve the cultivation of this replica body.

Originally, he also wanted to directly copy the Chiyan Three-Headed Dragon, but his cultivation was not as good as the other party, and he couldn't copy it, so he could only copy the weakly cultivated Ten Thousand Blood Golden Ape first, as long as he was given a period of time, he could improve the cultivation of this legendary creature, and then he could kill those powerful legendary creatures.

Soon.

Ye Tian found an area of the legendary river abyss, settled here, and then began to cultivate.

At the same time, he will also communicate with other legendary creatures to gain information about the place.

Gradually, he learned more about the legend of the river abyss.

"Legend has it that the river abyss actually has more than a hundred supreme legendary-level creatures!"

Ye Tian was extremely surprised.

That's a lot, if you kill more, you'll have to get more than a hundred copies of the blood of the strongest legend!

In addition, he also learned that there is also a forbidden area in the legendary river abyss, and no legendary-level creature is allowed to enter, otherwise it will definitely die.

"That's where the legendary creature of the top patriarch is retreating. "

Ye Tian said darkly.

The years passed.

Ye Tian's cultivation of this copied body gradually improved, and with the second sequence of supreme dao rules constantly refining the physical body, his strength naturally skyrocketed rapidly.

Coupled with Ye Tian's constant plundering of the resources here, it was not difficult to improve his cultivation.

About 100,000 years after the Dao Era, Ye Tian's cultivation of the 10,000-blooded golden ape's copied body was raised to the late stage of the Legend level, which was equivalent to the late stage of the Legend to the Dao Realm.

"Almost, with my second sequence to the realm of Dao Rule Consummation, it is not difficult to kill an ordinary supreme legendary-level creature!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Moreover, he also inquired about those supreme legendary creatures, and he first found the weakest one.

Legend has it that somewhere in the river abyss.

This is the territory of the strongest legendary-level creature dragon monkey, but Ye Tian sneaked here.

Rumble!!!!!

Ye Tian directly attacked and killed the dragon monkey.

The cultivation of the dragon monkey is only in the late stage of the legendary level, and its strength is the weakest of these supreme legendary-level creatures.

The second sequence of Dao rules broke out and directly killed the other party.

Immediately afterwards, Ye Tian put away the dragon monkey corpse and prepared to leave.

After that, he prepares to attack and kill the second Xeon Legendary creature.
